APP_DESCRIPTION: Self-hosted wardrobe organizer. Catalog clothes with photos, build outfits, and install as an offline PWA. Free and open-source. No subscription, no ads.
PAGE_TITLE_HOME: Libre Closet - Free Self-Hosted Wardrobe Organizer
HERO_DESCRIPTION: Libre Closet is a free, open-source, self-hosted wardrobe organizer. Catalog your clothes with photos, build outfits, and keep your style data on your own server - no subscriptions, no ads, and no third-party tracking.
FEATURES_TITLE: Everything you need, nothing you don't
FEATURE_PRIVACY_DESC: Your wardrobe data never leaves your server. Unlike SaaS alternatives that mine your clothing preferences, Libre Closet runs entirely on your hardware with no tracking, no ads, and no third parties.
FEATURE_PWA_DESC: Install to your home screen and use it without an internet connection. The progressive web app works on desktop and mobile, syncing data locally for instant access even when you're offline.
FEATURE_OUTFITS_DESC: Mix and match garments with a visual, drag-and-drop outfit builder. Inspired by the Clueless closet interface, compose complete looks in seconds and save them for later.
FEATURE_SCHEDULING_DESC: Plan what to wear ahead of time on a visual calendar. Schedule outfits for the week, track what you've worn, and avoid repeating looks unintentionally.
FEATURE_BG_REMOVAL_DESC: Clean up garment photos automatically with on-device AI background removal. No image editing skills needed - snap a photo and let the ML model isolate your clothing on any background. Runs client-side, so your server needs no GPU or expensive hardware.
FEATURE_CATEGORIES_DESC: Adapt garment categories to your own closet rather than forcing your style into rigid defaults. Create custom types, rename existing ones, and organize your wardrobe your way.
FEATURE_DOCKER_DESC: Self-host in seconds with Docker on any Linux server, NAS, or Raspberry Pi. Your data stays on your infrastructure - no vendor lock-in, no monthly bills.
FEATURE_I18N_DESC: Available in English, Italian, French, Russian, German, and Spanish with community-contributed translations. Use Libre Closet in your preferred language.
FEATURE_SHARING_DESC: Share your wardrobe with friends, family, or a personal stylist. Grant VIEW access for browsing or MANAGE access for collaborative editing - you control the permissions.
WHY_SELF_HOST_DESC: Most wardrobe apps are SaaS products that store your clothing data on their servers, analyze your preferences for advertising, and can disappear overnight taking your catalog with them. Libre Closet takes a different approach: it runs on your own hardware, stores data in a local SQLite or Postgres database you control, and is licensed under the AGPL-3.0 to guarantee it remains free and open forever. You get all the features of a modern wardrobe organizer - visual outfit building, background removal, scheduling, sharing - without surrendering your personal style data to a corporation.
SELF_HOST_DESC: Run Libre Closet on your own server, NAS, or Raspberry Pi with a single Docker command.
SELF_HOST_NOTE: See the README for docker-compose and environment variable options.

SHARE_WARDROBE_DESC: Invite someone to view or manage your wardrobe.
INVITE_VIEW_DESC: They can view all your garments but cannot edit, add, or delete anything.
INVITE_MANAGE_DESC: They can view, add, and edit garments in your wardrobe, but cannot delete.
INVITE_LOGIN_REQUIRED: You need to log in or create an account to accept this invitation.
PRIVACY_OG_DESC: Libre Closet privacy policy. How your data is handled on the public cloud instance and on self-hosted instances. No tracking, no ads, no third parties.
PRIVACY_INTRO: Libre Closet is designed to put you in control of your data, whether you use the public cloud instance hosted by Lazztech or run the software on your own server. This page explains how your data is handled in each scenario.
PRIVACY_PUBLIC_DATA_ITEMS: When you create an account and use the public instance at librecloset.lazz.tech, you provide: email address (for account creation and authentication), clothing photos you upload, garment metadata (categories, brands, colors, sizes, notes), and outfit compositions you create. This data is stored on servers managed by Lazztech LLC.
PRIVACY_PUBLIC_DATA_STORAGE_DESC: Data on the public instance is stored in a database hosted on infrastructure managed by Lazztech LLC. We use industry-standard security practices to protect your data. Your wardrobe data is used solely to provide the service. It is never sold, mined for advertising, or shared with third parties beyond essential infrastructure providers.
PRIVACY_PUBLIC_THIRD_PARTY_DESC: The public instance uses Cloudflare for CDN, DDoS protection, and basic performance analytics. No personal wardrobe data is shared with Cloudflare or any other third party.
PRIVACY_PUBLIC_RIGHTS_DESC: You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data at any time through your account settings. You can delete individual garments, entire outfits, or your full account. To request complete data deletion, contact us via GitHub or email. We will respond within 30 days.
PRIVACY_SELF_HOSTED_DATA_ITEMS: When you self-host Libre Closet, you provide: email address (for account creation), clothing photos you upload, garment metadata (categories, brands, colors, sizes, notes), and outfit compositions you create. All of this data is stored in a database on your own server.
PRIVACY_SELF_HOSTED_DATA_STORAGE_DESC: Self-hosted Libre Closet stores all data in a SQLite or PostgreSQL database on your server. No data is sent to Lazztech, third-party analytics services, or advertising networks. You control backups, retention, and deletion.
PRIVACY_SELF_HOSTED_THIRD_PARTY_DESC: The application loads no third-party services. No data is shared with any third party.
PRIVACY_SELF_HOSTED_RIGHTS_DESC: Since your data stays on your server, you have full control. You can export your data, delete your account, or remove individual items at any time. No one else can access your data unless you invite them.
PRIVACY_CONTACT_DESC: For privacy questions, open an issue on GitHub or contact Lazztech LLC.
ABOUT_OG_TITLE: About Libre Closet — Self-Hosted Wardrobe Organizer
ABOUT_OG_DESC: Learn about Libre Closet, the free open-source self-hosted wardrobe organizer built by Lazztech. Our story, technology, and mission.
ABOUT_INTRO: Libre Closet is a free, open-source, self-hosted wardrobe organizer built by Lazztech LLC.
ABOUT_STORY_DESC: We built Libre Closet because we were tired of wardrobe apps that lock your personal style data behind subscriptions, mine your preferences for advertising, and can disappear overnight. We believe your wardrobe data belongs to you, on your hardware, under your control, forever.
ABOUT_OPEN_SOURCE_DESC: Libre Closet is licensed under the AGPL-3.0, guaranteeing it remains free and open forever. The full source code is available on GitHub. Contributions, translations, and feature requests are welcome from the community.
ABOUT_TECH_DESC: Built with NestJS, HTMX, SQLite/PostgreSQL, Docker, and ONNX runtime for client-side AI background removal. The progressive web app works offline on desktop and mobile.
TERMS_OG_DESC: Terms of service for Libre Closet, the AGPL-3.0 licensed self-hosted wardrobe organizer. License, warranty, and contact information.
TERMS_INTRO: By using Libre Closet, you agree to these terms. Libre Closet is free and open-source software licensed under the AGPL-3.0.
TERMS_SERVICE_DESC: Libre Closet is a self-hosted wardrobe organizer. When you self-host, you run the software on your own infrastructure. Lazztech LLC provides the source code and optional hosted public instance but does not control your self-hosted instance or your data.
TERMS_LICENSE_DESC: Libre Closet is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). You are free to use, modify, and distribute the software under the terms of this license.
TERMS_NO_WARRANTY_DESC: The software is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind. Lazztech LLC is not liable for any damages arising from the use of the software.
TERMS_CONTACT_DESC: For questions about these terms, open an issue on GitHub or contact Lazztech LLC.
LOGIN_OG_DESC: Sign in to your Libre Closet account to manage your wardrobe, build outfits, and schedule looks.
REGISTER_OG_DESC: Create your free Libre Closet account. Self-hosted, open-source wardrobe organizer. No subscription, no ads, no tracking.
